Remarks: This recording was previously uploaded on Project Avocet as AV 8891. (The recording was slightly clipped).  The bird was permanently feeding on flowers just in front of my observation platform.  Occassionaly singing and calling. I watched it for hours in a row at less then two meters distance.... (unfortunately, my camera was stolen a week earlier ...). This is probably now one of the rarest birds in Asia...
